_superseded: SUPERSEDED — retained until apply-agent-research lands, then removed. See docs/design/cross-repo-knowledge-application.md: the static KB allow-list is replaced by runtime relevance judgment.
_comment: Acquisition contract for the self-improvement run-book (C): which knowledge base, and which knowledge/ subpaths to read. Explicit allow-list only — the reader never auto-discovers subjects or categories on disk. The KB root is cloned by the VPS via a deploy key (ADR 0003); these subpaths are relative to it. Mirrors gap-scanner-repos.json.
